content: The intrinsic reward signals that power curiosity-driven methods like ICM and RND can be repurposed as a dynamic memory pruning gate for state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems, where only surprising, unpredicted transitions that trigger intrinsic curiosity are stored in long-term episodic memory. This creates a self-organizing memory pipeline that automatically prioritizes high-information state representations without manual memory budget tuning.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
